description_long: This is a modern, slim laptop with a dark, matte finish and a large, high-resolution display. The screen is open, revealing a full-sized keyboard with illuminated keys and a spacious touchpad below. The chassis appears to be constructed from metal, likely aluminum, with some plastic elements for the keyboard and bezel. The laptop features a thin profile, with visible ports along the left and right edges for connectivity. The display shows a blurred blue gradient, suggesting the device is powered on but not displaying specific content. No visible branding or stickers are present on the exterior surfaces.
description: A sleek, dark-colored laptop with a large screen, illuminated keyboard, and a slim, modern design.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the closed back of the laptop's display lid, with no visible branding or ports.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the thin profile, open screen, illuminated keyboard, and visible side ports.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the full screen, illuminated keyboard, and large touchpad, ideal for user interaction.
description_view_3: Right-side view showing the slim design, open screen, and additional side ports.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and powered on, displaying a blurred blue gradient with no specific content visible.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with a function row and illuminated keys; no numeric keypad is visible.
